title: JPO SMP
description: A lightweight fabric modpack. Focuses on vanilla+ and QOL mods, with the ablity to continue to be updated to latest minecraft verisions!
body:
JPO SMP — Vanilla+ Survival

JPO SMP is a lightweight Vanilla+ Fabric modpack made for smooth, fun multiplayer survival. It keeps Minecraft’s core gameplay intact while adding quality-of-life improvements and optimizations.


Perfect for friends who want classic survival, just polished.
